question: What default date range should be used for transactional WMS questions when the user does not specify one?
answer: For transactional WMS data questions, unless the user explicitly specifies a different time range, default the answer to data created or updated in the last 90 days. This rule exists because WMS operational tables are highly transactional, and open-ended historical queries can misrepresent current activity. For shipment questions, pair that default recency rule with the business meaning of CREATION_TYPE and SHIPMENT_STATUS when relevant.
notes: User-approved business rule for default transactional recency in WMS IQ answers.
